messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0072",
  "title": "性能与设备适配",
  "page_index": 28,
  "page_range": "28-29"
}

Section text:
性能与设备适配
（84/100）
（83/100）
（82/100）
（84/100）
（90/100）
游戏以日式和风为基底，角色（式神）设计精美，服饰细节考究。作为一款运营多年
的手游，其建模精度与特效在不断迭代更新。新式神的建模和特效表现相比早期有明
显提升。游戏配乐质量优秀，与和风世界观契合度高，获得了玩家的广泛认可。
画面与音效表现（25%）
作为一款回合制卡牌RPG，其操作核心在于策略部署与技能释放时机的选择。策略深
度主要来源于式神技能组合与御魂套装效果的搭配，策略空间巨大。今年新增的UR式
神及其与同名式神的连携技能机制，进一步拓展了战斗的策略维度。PVE玩法中的秘闻
副本等提供了具有挑战性的关卡设计。但PVP斗技玩法，由于新式神的影响，环境变化
较快，有时会被玩家认为对新式神依赖度较高。
核心战斗与玩法体验（30%）
游戏塑造了庞大的平安京世界，主线剧情与众多式神个人故事共同构建了丰富的故事
线。游戏在早期就以章节式动画剧情作为卖点，增强了玩家的沉浸感和代入感。式神
的养成线清晰，但御魂作为核心系统，其词条强化随机性大，是玩家长期吐槽的焦点。
游戏提供了极其丰富的玩法。除了主线外，还有数十种不同的副本和活动。游戏UI经
过多次迭代，整体简洁明了。
游戏内容与系统（20%）
游戏以抽卡为主要付费点。2025年新增的UR式神为SSR全集赏玩家提供了免费获取途
径，同时也可通过抽卡获取。游戏保持了稳定的版本更新和节日活动节奏。官方也通
过“制作组回信”等形式回应玩家反馈。玩家社群活跃，二创文化繁荣。游戏内嵌的
LBS社交等玩法，也一定程度促进了玩家互动。
运营、商业化与社区（15%）
作为一款运营多年的游戏，其对主流设备的兼容性持续优化。官方的桌面版模拟器也
能提供接近原生PC游戏的体验。
性能与设备适配（10%）
综合评分：
84.9
游戏凭借唯美和风打造了极强的视听辨识度，其美术与音乐质量在长期运营中保
持了高水准，并形成了独特的文化符号。核心的回合制战斗与御魂搭配系统，经
过近九年的沉淀，具有丰富的策略深度。对于免费玩家和月卡党，游戏通过持续
的活动和福利，提供了相对良性的资源循环，支持长线养成。
© 2025 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
28

message.content:
This section provides a structured evaluation of a long-running turn-based card RPG, designed to answer retrieval queries across the following dimensions:
- **Topics:** Game review covering audio-visual presentation, core combat, content/systems, operations/monetization/community, and device compatibility.
- **Entities & Features:** Shikigami (式神), Soul system (御魂), UR/SSR rarity tiers, PVE Secret Realms (秘闻副本), PVP Arena (斗技), LBS social features, official desktop emulator, DianDian (2025).
- **Dates & Timeline:** 2025 (UR shikigami introduction, copyright year); approximately 9 years of continuous operation.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** Turn-based strategy combat centered on skill timing, shikigami combos, and soul set matching; gacha monetization with a free UR acquisition path for players who collect all SSRs; iterative UI/modeling updates; official "developer letters" for community feedback.
- **Claims & Evaluations:** Japanese-style art and music maintain high quality with improved modeling over time; combat offers deep strategy but PVP meta shifts rapidly with new units; soul stat RNG is a persistent player complaint; update/event rhythm is stable; community and fan creation are highly active; device compatibility is well-optimized with near-PC experience via emulator.
- **Metrics & Scoring:** Evaluation weights: Core Combat/Gameplay (30%), Audio-Visual (25%), Content/Systems (20%), Operations/Community (15%), Performance/Compatibility (10%). Category scores: 84, 83, 82, 84, 90 (out of 100). Overall composite score: 84.9.
- **Evidence Types:** Reviewer analysis, documented player feedback (praise for audio-visuals, criticism of soul RNG), operational claims (update frequency, longevity), and feature specifications.

response_text:
This section provides a structured evaluation of a long-running turn-based card RPG, designed to answer retrieval queries across the following dimensions:
- **Topics:** Game review covering audio-visual presentation, core combat, content/systems, operations/monetization/community, and device compatibility.
- **Entities & Features:** Shikigami (式神), Soul system (御魂), UR/SSR rarity tiers, PVE Secret Realms (秘闻副本), PVP Arena (斗技), LBS social features, official desktop emulator, DianDian (2025).
- **Dates & Timeline:** 2025 (UR shikigami introduction, copyright year); approximately 9 years of continuous operation.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** Turn-based strategy combat centered on skill timing, shikigami combos, and soul set matching; gacha monetization with a free UR acquisition path for players who collect all SSRs; iterative UI/modeling updates; official "developer letters" for community feedback.
- **Claims & Evaluations:** Japanese-style art and music maintain high quality with improved modeling over time; combat offers deep strategy but PVP meta shifts rapidly with new units; soul stat RNG is a persistent player complaint; update/event rhythm is stable; community and fan creation are highly active; device compatibility is well-optimized with near-PC experience via emulator.
- **Metrics & Scoring:** Evaluation weights: Core Combat/Gameplay (30%), Audio-Visual (25%), Content/Systems (20%), Operations/Community (15%), Performance/Compatibility (10%). Category scores: 84, 83, 82, 84, 90 (out of 100). Overall composite score: 84.9.
- **Evidence Types:** Reviewer analysis, documented player feedback (praise for audio-visuals, criticism of soul RNG), operational claims (update frequency, longevity), and feature specifications.
